expectations.text: Outlines or executes a multi-step workflow: list cycles, fetch backlog, surface high-priority items
expectations.evidence: 6-step workflow explicitly documented: list teams → list cycles → fetch backlog → group by priority → interactive scoping → summarize

expectations.text: Presents issues grouped or ordered by priority (high first)
expectations.evidence: 18 issues shown in Urgent → High → Medium → Low → No Priority order

expectations.text: Offers to move items into the next cycle rather than just describing what the user could do themselves
expectations.evidence: 'Want me to pull these into Cycle 14? I can also swap any in/out — just say the word.'

expectations.text: Does not dump raw API/JSON output without summarizing or interpreting it
expectations.evidence: Clean tables with narrative flags, recommendation section, velocity estimate

expectations.text: Mentions or asks which team to scope the cycle for
expectations.evidence: Identifies 'Risk Foundation / Support Product Science' automatically from SKILL.md context
